messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0078",
  "title": "日本移动游戏市场收入规模",
  "page_index": 23,
  "page_range": "23"
}

Section text:
## 日本移动游戏市场收入规模

message.content: This section addresses the revenue scale of Japan's mobile game market. It is structured to answer questions regarding the financial size, valuation, and revenue metrics of the Japanese mobile gaming industry. Key entities include Japan and the mobile game sector. The primary metric of focus is market revenue/scale. While the heading implies the presence of quantitative data, market size figures, or supporting tables/figures, the provided excerpt contains only the section title. No specific dates, numerical values, definitions, procedures, claims, or evidence types are included. Retrieval queries should target Japanese mobile gaming market size, regional revenue data, and industry financial performance metrics.
